message:
test(swarm,policy): property-based queue tests, ownership-integrity integration, MCP search surface regressions

Three categories of test additions:

1. proptest_swarm_work_queue.rs (+260 lines): Seven new property-based
   tests and one deterministic test covering:
   - DAG fan-in: sink node with two deps stays Blocked until BOTH complete
   - Cycle detection: back-edges in linear chains rejected
   - Anti-starvation: respects priority when no items actually starved;
     boosts long-waiting low-priority items over newer high-priority ones
   - Batch enqueue: topological chain keeps only head Ready; reverse
     order produces DependencyNotFound errors
   - Beads importer roundtrip: only open/in_progress records imported

2. swarm_orchestration_integration.rs (+86 lines): Two new integration
   tests verifying the ownership enforcement fix:
   - work_queue_rejects_completion_from_non_owner_agent: agent-2 cannot
     complete() a work item assigned to agent-1
   - work_queue_rejects_failure_from_non_owner_agent: same for fail()

3. main.rs (+93 lines): Two new async tests for MCP search policy surface:
   - search_policy_mcp_actor_uses_mux_surface_override: deny rule scoped
     to surface=mcp does NOT match MCP search (overridden to mux)
   - search_policy_mcp_actor_matches_mux_surface_rule: deny rule scoped
     to surface=mux DOES match and denies MCP search operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -43039,6 +43039,99 @@ log_level = "debug"
         );
     }
 
+    #[tokio::test]
+    async fn search_policy_mcp_actor_uses_mux_surface_override() {
+        let mut config = frankenterm_core::config::Config::default();
+        config.safety.rules.enabled = true;
+        config
+            .safety
+            .rules
+            .rules
+            .push(frankenterm_core::config::PolicyRule {
+                id: "test.deny.mcp.search.surface.mcp".to_string(),
+                description: Some("deny mcp search only when surface is mcp".to_string()),
+                priority: 1,
+                match_on: frankenterm_core::config::PolicyRuleMatch {
+                    actions: vec!["search_output".to_string()],
+                    actors: vec!["mcp".to_string()],
+                    surfaces: vec!["mcp".to_string()],
+                    ..Default::default()
+                },
+                decision: frankenterm_core::config::PolicyRuleDecision::Deny,
+                message: Some("should not match when helper sets mux surface".to_string()),
+            });
+
+        let (decision, _domain) = authorize_read_or_search_policy(
+            &config,
+            None,
+            None,
+            frankenterm_core::policy::ActionKind::SearchOutput,
+            frankenterm_core::policy::ActorKind::Mcp,
+            None,
+            "mcp search test",
+        )
+        .await;
+
+        assert!(
+            decision.is_allowed(),
+            "mcp-surface-only deny rule should not match when helper sets mux surface"
+        );
+        let context = decision
+            .context()
+            .expect("read/search decisions should include decision context");
+        assert_eq!(
+            context.surface,
+            frankenterm_core::policy::PolicySurface::Mux
+        );
+    }
+
+    #[tokio::test]
+    async fn search_policy_mcp_actor_matches_mux_surface_rule() {
+        let mut config = frankenterm_core::config::Config::default();
+        config.safety.rules.enabled = true;
+        config
+            .safety
+            .rules
+            .rules
+            .push(frankenterm_core::config::PolicyRule {
+                id: "test.deny.mcp.search.surface.mux".to_string(),
+                description: Some("deny mcp search when helper surface is mux".to_string()),
+                priority: 1,
+                match_on: frankenterm_core::config::PolicyRuleMatch {
+                    actions: vec!["search_output".to_string()],
+                    actors: vec!["mcp".to_string()],
+                    surfaces: vec!["mux".to_string()],
+                    ..Default::default()
+                },
+                decision: frankenterm_core::config::PolicyRuleDecision::Deny,
+                message: Some("mcp search blocked on mux surface".to_string()),
+            });
+
+        let (decision, _domain) = authorize_read_or_search_policy(
+            &config,
+            None,
+            None,
+            frankenterm_core::policy::ActionKind::SearchOutput,
+            frankenterm_core::policy::ActorKind::Mcp,
+            None,
+            "mcp search test",
+        )
+        .await;
+
+        assert!(
+            decision.is_denied(),
+            "mux-surface deny rule should match for mcp actor read/search helper"
+        );
+        assert_eq!(decision.reason(), Some("mcp search blocked on mux surface"));
+        let context = decision
+            .context()
+            .expect("read/search decisions should include decision context");
+        assert_eq!(
+            context.surface,
+            frankenterm_core::policy::PolicySurface::Mux
+        );
+    }
+
